template.p: This master guide combines Odoo's specialized packages for the bike industry. It covers both long-term subscription business models (Bike Leasing) and traditional retail, online, and workshop setups (Bike Shop) into a single, connected operational workflow.

By linking your front-end sales channels directly with background inventory, workshop tracking, and billing, Odoo ensures your operations stay organized while offering a smooth experience to your clients.
You can access every installed App in your Odoo database on your main dashboard.

li.p: The Point of Sale (PoS) manages bike and accessory sales directly in the store.
The Sales App create and manage quotations, sales orders, and long-term leasing contracts.
The CRM App tracks new customer inquiries, manages long-term leasing leads, and organizes sales pipelines.
The eCommerce App sell bikes, configurations, and recurring subscription plans online with a customizable web store.
The Project App organizes and tracks repair tasks, deadlines, and parts used in the workshop.
The Planning App organizes and allocates technician shifts, manages workshop repair schedules, and tracks resource availability.
The Inventory App tracks bike and parts stock, including serial numbers and automated rental return schedules.
The Purchase App manages vendor orders, restocks parts, and handles supplier delivery minimums.
The Website App manages your online presence and allow customers to book appointments or test rides.
The Helpdesk App manages warranty claims, leasing customer support, and general service requests.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false

div.p: Odoo is entirely integrated into an App. Download it to turn your phone into a tool to manage your entire workflow.

template.p: By uploading this module's demo data, your database has been filled with a few contacts.
You should be able to execute the following flows to have an overview of various flows you can quickly execute with this package using Odoo.
Of course, this is just an overview of the features included in this package. Feel free to add new apps, delete/modify demo data, and test everything around!

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-warning pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false

div.p: You didn't import demo data? You can still do it. Go to Apps > Industries > Upgrade your Interior Design package and check the related box.

template.p: Manage in-store transactions for bikes, accessories, or specific parts with the Point of Sale (PoS) app.

li.p: Open the Point of Sale App and start a session by clicking on your register.

Add products to the cart by scanning barcodes or searching manually and manage bikes with product variants (e.g. frame size, color) to keep a single product reference while tracking specific configurations for stock, pricing, and availability.
Proceed to payment by using the selected method; cash, card or on the Customer Account if you let the user pay later (e.g. if you order the specific model from the manufacturer for the client.)
Inventory levels update automatically after each sale.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false

div.p: Configure Optional Products: Suggest relevant accessories such as helmets, locks, or lights by configuring them as optional products, which appear during checkout to encourage upselling.

template.p: Sell bikes and services online using the Website and eCommerce apps, providing a complete digital shopping experience for your clients.

li.p: Configure your website to present your bike catalog, services, and brand mission with a clean and structured layout.
Organize products by category (e.g., VTT, Cargo, Electric) to help users quickly find the right bike type.
Enable test ride bookings by integrating the Appointment app, so users can reserve a slot to try a bike directly from the product page.
Set up payment and delivery methods: let customers choose between home delivery or in-store pickup, and secure transactions with trusted payment gateways.
Allow leasing clients to pick recurring plans (Monthly, Quarterly, or Yearly) with prices automatically driven by your predefined, selectable pricelists.

template.h3: Manage Orders via the Sales App
template.p: Handle Services of Repairs and Maintenance, as well as customized long-term leasing options through the Sales app, with integration to CRM, planning, inventory, and communication tools.

li.p: Lead Acquisition: Track incoming requests for fleet leasing or high-end custom bikes inside the CRM app. Inquiries from your website contact forms or emails automatically generate a new opportunity card in your sales pipeline.

Drag and drop leads through pipeline stages (e.g., New, Qualified, Proposition) and launch a specific quote directly inside the card by clicking the "New Quotation" button, which links the CRM history directly to the Sales app.

Open the Sales app from the main dashboard to view generated documents, or create a Sales Order manually by setting the required fields for a subscription (Customer, Pricelist / Recurring, Until, and Products).
Use the Chatter feature inside the order or the CRM card to easily communicate with the customer, log phone calls, and finalize details like delivery dates and renting durations.
Confirm the Sales Order to trigger the appropriate actions:
For bike or parts sales, a delivery order is generated, reserving the product from stock and updating the inventory accordingly.
For repairs or maintenance, a task is created automatically under the "Workshop" Project, and a service slot can be assigned to a mechanic using the Planning app.

Send the finished proposal via email for the customer to confirm instantly with an official digital signature. Once all tasks related to the Sales Order are marked as done, the order becomes collectible and notifies the customer via an automated email.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false

div.p: Customize customer notifications: Personalize the "Order Ready" email by enabling Debug Mode, navigating to Email Templates, and editing "Sales Order: Order Ready". You can also configure automated messages via SMS and WhatsApp using Odoo’s marketing automation and messaging integrations.

template.p: Handle all repair, maintenance, and long-term asset inspections efficiently with the Planning and Project apps.

li.p: Open the Planning app to check your assigned repair shifts, scheduled jobs, or workshop priorities.

Select your assigned task from the "Workshop" Project to begin the repair. Log each product used (e.g., brake pads, chains) directly on the task line. These will be automatically added to the related Sales Order and invoiced later.
For specific repairs, track the time spent working your shift using the Timesheet feature, allowing accurate billing based on time spent.
Mark the task as Done when completed. Once all tasks linked to the Sales Order are in this stage, a notification email will automatically be sent to the customer confirming that their bike is ready.
Complete the repair and maintenance worksheet using a Worksheet Template (e.g., checklist of performed operations, technician name, signature field,...). The client can sign it upon collection.

When the customer returns to pick up the bike, open the Point of Sale (PoS) app, load the related Sales Order (quotation), and proceed with the payment. Odoo allows retrieving existing quotations in the PoS for seamless final payment processing.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-warning pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false

div.p: Filter repair tasks by Serial Number to view a bike’s repair history; helpful for recurring maintenance actions like annual oil checks on specific components.

Customize your project stages in the “Workshop” project: add columns like “Waiting for Parts” to better track blocked repairs waiting for a parts delivery, or “Ready for Pick-Up" when the repair is done.

template.h3: Handle warranty cases through the Helpdesk app:

li.p: Open the “Warranties / After-Sales / SAV” team in the Helpdesk app to manage all warranty tickets and general leasing support inquiries.

Create a ticket to verify the warranty or answer support questions. You can automate ticket creation by sharing specialized email aliases (e.g., warranties@bike-shop.odoo.com or help@qfr-bike-leasing.odoo.com) which turn incoming messages into tickets automatically.

Link the ticket to the related Sales Order Line and the matching Workshop task (e.g. repair on the client’s Cube bike). Move the ticket to the “Sent to Brand” column and use an Email Template to contact the brand for warranty confirmation.
Based on the brand’s response, check or uncheck the "Warranty" box on the Workshop task to reflect whether the repair is covered.

template.p: Manage bike parts, showroom items, and long-term rental stock efficiently using the Purchase and Inventory apps to avoid shortages and streamline restocking.

li.p: Create a Purchase Order from the Purchase app when specific parts (e.g., tires, brakes) are running low.
Select your preferred vendor based on pricing or delivery performance to optimize purchase conditions.
Once the purchase is confirmed, send the Request for Quotation (RFQ) via email or confirm it manually.
When the goods arrive, click the “Receipt” smart button to validate the incoming shipment and add parts to your inventory.
In the Contact app, manage your preferred vendors and set reminders/warnings if there is a minimum order amount required to get free transport costs.
Go to the Inventory app and open the product (e.g., brake pads). Use the Smart Buttons on the product page to access the Reordering Rules.
Set the minimum and maximum stock levels. Define the quantities that will trigger automatic restocking (e.g., Min: 10, Max: 50).
Let Odoo handle reorders automatically. When forecasted stock drops below the minimum, Odoo will generate a Purchase Order based on your settings.

For confirmed lease orders, an inventory delivery is built automatically to track the specific bike. You must fill in its unique serial number, and Odoo will create a return reminder activity matching the end date of the leasing contract.
Use the auto-post feature to automatically generate and send recurring invoices to leasing customers according to your preferred method (email, snail mail, or e-invoicing).

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false

div.p: Add vendor lead times on each product to anticipate delivery delays and organize procurement planning accordingly (e.g., 5-day lead time for imported suspension forks).

ul.li: A new corporate lead inquires online about fleet leasing; a pipeline opportunity instantly populates in your CRM app.
You configure the client's custom order right inside the CRM opportunity card. Choose bike sizes and colors easily, add optional extras like helmets, and select a quarterly payment plan.
You generate and send a Sales Order directly from the CRM card, which the customer confirms using a digital signature.
Odoo automatically schedules a service or assembly slot in the Planning app and generates a delivery slip tracking the bike's serial number in the Inventory app.
Your mechanics complete the final setup check during their planned shift, add any extra setup parts used to the task, and mark the project task as Done.
The customer gets an automated email letting them know the bike fleet is ready for pickup or delivery.
Finish the payment when the customer picks up the items directly from the PoS using the linked order, or let the system automatically post monthly/quarterly leasing invoices.
Stock updates automatically, and missing parts are reordered based on minimum levels you’ve set.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false

div.p: You completed that demo use case! There are millions of other ways to adapt your Odoo setup to fit your business needs. Discover more about Odoo by diving into our documentation and academy, and feel free to request a demo if you need help!

template.h2: Do you want to go further?

ul.li: Add the Employees App to manage your mechanics and sales team profiles, contracts, and roles.
Use the Planning App to organize broader schedule shifts for your front desk, workshop team, and retail store managers.
Simplify accounting and financial tracking with the Accounting App.
Engage your customers using Email Marketing, SMS Marketing, and Marketing Automation based on their CRM buying history.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false

div.p: Would you like to discuss your Odoo setup with us or go even further?
